entities.description: Chemicals used to treat seeds which may impact inoculation effectiveness

entities.name: SOIL APPLICATION

entities.description: The process of applying rhizobium directly to the seeds

entities.description: The medium used to deliver rhizobium during soil application

entities.name: INOCULATION RATE
